priority_region.label: Central Europe
priority_region.notes: M20 interwar CE geometry. Sudeten / Anschluss / Polish corridor framing for the HOI-leaning 1936 start.

source_notes: Curator-authored soft frontier bands and sample hard overrides for M20 multi-region period geometry.
Not derived from proprietary game maps.
Hard overrides target sample_* CE province IDs; they skip cleanly on full Natural Earth builds.
do_not_claim: Paradox-grade interwar microborders or fortification blueprints
legal 1936 frontiers — hints are illustrative for the historical sniff test

boundary_hints.label: Sudetenland fringe band
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band for Sudeten German claims on Czechoslovakia at the 1936 start (pre-Munich).

boundary_hints.label: Anschluss approach / Austrian independence
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band for independent Austria pre-Anschluss (1938).

boundary_hints.label: Polish corridor / Danzig approach
boundary_hints.notes: Illustrative northern approach toward the Polish corridor / Free City story (soft only; sample Mazovia is further south).

boundary_hints.label: Hungarian revisionist fringe
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band for interwar Hungarian revisionist claims on neighbors.

hard_overrides.reason: Interwar Czechoslovakia core label + modest footprint for Sudeten-band readability on the CE sample.
Vienna retained; Anschluss story via soft corridor + politics.
Mazovia retained; corridor story via soft northern band.
Hungarian plain retained; revisionist fringe via soft frontier.
